summary:
I’ll need to see how the project is laid out and what the `test.sh` script is actually doing so I can pinpoint where the “needle” belongs. Could you paste:

- The full output of `ls -R .` from your project root  
- The contents of `test.sh`  
- Any failure message you get when running `./test.sh`  

That will let me locate exactly what needs to be fixed.
